title: Three-Month Rotating Wall Calendar Shelf
summary: A wall-mounted shelf sized to hold three 14" dry-erase monthly calendars side by side, so you can see this month, last month, and next month at a glance.
description:
This is a plain shelf, not a cabinet — three 1x6 boards run the full width, deep enough to hold a stack of 14" dry-erase calendars leaning against the wall, with two short 1x3 end brackets supporting the shelf boards from below. The whole point is the sizing: three calendars fit side by side, so you're never looking at just the current month in isolation.

Attach the shelf boards to the end brackets with self-tapping star bit screws, then mount the whole thing level to the wall — use a heavy-duty picture hanging bracket into a stud, or screw directly into studs if that fits your wall layout better. **Check level carefully before final mounting**, since a shelf holding three flat calendars will show any tilt immediately.

materials.name: 14 in x 14 in dry erase calendars
Heavy-duty picture hanging bracket and wall anchor

steps.title: Cut all the parts
steps.body: Cut three shelf boards at 48" from the 1x6. Cut two end brackets at 15-1/2" from the 1x3. Allowing about 1/8" for each saw cut, that comes to three 8 ft 1x6 and one 8 ft 1x3. Square every cut and label each piece as it comes off the saw.

steps.title: Attach the shelf boards
steps.body: Screw the three shelf boards to the two end brackets, keeping them flush and evenly spaced.

steps.title: Finish
steps.body: Sand and apply paint or stain to the assembled shelf.

steps.title: Mount to the wall
steps.body: Mount the shelf level using a heavy-duty picture hanging bracket into a stud, or screw directly into studs.
materials: Heavy-duty picture hanging bracket and wall anchor

steps.title: Add the calendars
steps.body: Set the three dry-erase calendars side by side on the shelf, rotating them monthly so the current month stays in the center.
materials: 14 in x 14 in dry erase calendars

unresolvedImages.alt: Wall shelf holding three rotating dry erase calendars
